creator: rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com
text:
On 2014-03-16 18:10, Edwin Groothuis wrote: 

> Maintainer of graphics/showimage,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/187638 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/187638 [1]

This patch works as designed and should be committed. 

Thanks!
Rusty Nejdl
